schema.ion.id › trade › consideration › v1

trade/consideration/v1

Pack IRI: https://schema.ion.id/trade/consideration/v1#  |  Layer: L5 — Trade sector  |  Version: v1

context.jsonld attributes.yaml vocab.jsonld

Schemas in this pack

TradeConsiderationAttributes

IRI: https://schema.ion.id/trade/consideration/v1#TradeConsiderationAttributes

PropertyMandatoryDescription
ppnRate—PPN (Pajak Pertambahan Nilai) rate applied to this consideration line. The applicable rate MUST be sourced from current
ppnbmRate—PPnBM (Pajak Penjualan atas Barang Mewah) rate for luxury goods. Applied in addition to PPN. Applicable rate MUST be sou
discountType—Whether the discount is a percentage of item price or a fixed IDR amount. Used on PROVIDER_BENEFIT and BUYER_BENEFIT con
discountValue—Value of the discount. If discountType=PERCENT, this is a decimal e.g. 0.10 for 10%. If discountType=FIXED, this is an I
breakupLineType—Canonical type for this consideration breakup line. ITEM: per-item price line. DELIVERY: shipping/delivery charge. TAX:
totalAmount—Total amount for this consideration in IDR. For the final consideration record, this is the net payable amount after all
currency—Always IDR for domestic ION transactions.

Pack README

trade/consideration/v1

Price breakup line types — ITEM, DELIVERY, TAX, PPNBM, PROVIDER_BENEFIT, COD_FEE etc.

Attaches to

`beckn:Consideration.considerationAttributes`

See `attributes.yaml` for complete field definitions.

Part of schema.ion.id — ION Network vocabulary. Built from schema/extensions/trade/consideration/v1/ in the ion-network spec. Generated 2026-04-27 18:43 UTC.
